title: FORGE subagent dispatch context_budget block
description: Documentation + test fixture only. hooks/check_budget.py stays stdlib-only and does NOT import this schema; it carries an independent frozen literal of the phase value it enforces. Drift between this enum and the canonical phase enum (schemas/state.schema.json phases.propertyNames) is asserted by tests/tools/test_budget_state_phase_parity.py.

phase.description: Optional FORGE phase the dispatch runs under. When 'execute', tests_in_scope is mandatory + non-empty unless tdd_exception_ref is set. Canonical enum source: schemas/state.schema.json (phases.propertyNames). The hook keeps an independent frozen literal of the only value it cares about ('execute'); parity between this enum and the canonical source is asserted by tests/tools/test_budget_state_phase_parity.py.

spec_sections.description: SPEC.md section names this dispatch needs to read.

files_in_scope.description: Bounded paths or globs the dispatch is allowed to load. Unbounded items (**, *.py repo-wide, etc.) are rejected by the hook.

tests_in_scope.description: Test files this dispatch will create or modify. Mandatory and non-empty when phase == 'execute', unless tdd_exception_ref is set. Optional otherwise.

tdd_exception_ref.description: ADR id from .forge/features/<id>/decisions.md (## TDD Exception: <ac-id>) that justifies an empty tests_in_scope under execute phase. Validator (tools.validate.tdd_evidence) cross-checks the ADR lists every AC the dispatch implements.

decisions_filter.description: tag:<topic> | all | none — selector for decisions.md filtering.

prior_summaries.description: References to prior slice/wave summaries the dispatch should consume.

forbidden.description: Explicit prohibitions for the dispatch (e.g. 'read entire repo').

articles.description: Optional filtered Constitution articles passed to the subagent (M3 P3).

return_format.description: Shape of the structured payload the subagent returns to the dispatcher.
